title: Tangy Salty Creamy Australian Milk Pudding
description: A festive Australian dish featuring a tangy and creamy milk pudding, perfect for individual servings. This recipe is suitable for anti-inflammatory diets.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine milk, ferment-jang, and sugar. Heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the sugar dissolves and the mixture is hot but not boiling.
In a small bowl, whisk together egg yolks and melted butter. Temper the egg yolks by slowly pouring the hot milk mixture into the egg yolks, whisking constantly.
Add the vanilla extract and salt to the egg yolk mixture and whisk until combined.
Pour the mixture into 6-8 mini cocottes or ramekins.
Place the cocottes in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the cocottes.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the cocottes from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
